matches.rationale: Both constrain the commit workflow by requiring validation gates before the relevant commit. The extraction is only partial: it omits the Sonnet-delegation condition, direct diff inspection, and the explicit TypeScript/test gate details.
The Bash trigger and evidence directly prohibit the final work-completion commit until /agent-review has run.

misses.note: Compiler self-reported skip: "핵심 코드 수정은 메인 에이전트가 직접 수행하고 서브에이전트에 위임하지 않는다 — Agent 도구 위임 여부에 관한 지침으로 Bash/Edit/Write 트리거에 바인딩 불가".

The TypeScript validation commands appear as a language-specific bullet under the build/lint section. The only validation extraction instead targets git commit and gives no TypeScript-specific trigger or commands; it is used for the closer commit-gate gold rule g2.

unmatched_extracted.note: The document contains a real action-bindable prohibition on editing implementation files before the mandatory /agent-plan step, but the frozen gold set has no rule for it.
